title: Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences
content: Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences Mechatronics Engineering Okan Homepage Education Academic Units Faculties Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences Departments Mechatronics Engineering MENU The aim of the Department of Mechatronics Engineering, where electronics, computer and mechanical sciences, which constitute the main structure of today's technology, are presented together, is to train researcher engineers who push the limits of competition at the international level to the end, have strong professional ethics, protect human values, are equipped with theoretical and practical knowledge at a level that can follow the latest technologies and requirements in the field and update their knowledge, and thus bring permanent and creative solutions to problems, have analytical thinking, problem solving and modelling skills. en tr
